no: Reminder: DoF DR FnP and ToF are incompatible, except when exchanging kits Why does it need to go before T&B? Use Kits' Colors -> redundant with CDTweaks Character Colors Instead of Item Colors Spheres System (by Kjeron) -> apparently MiH FR & SP and IWD spells bring too many lv7 cleric spells Install kit: Pain of Loviatar -> ERROR locating resource for 'COPY' Resource [%spell_res%.spl] not found in

passive.desc: +2 AC/THAC0/damage vs undead. Scaling save vs Death (+1 at 1/5/10/15/20). At lv20: immune to fear/disease/level drain/paralysis.

activated.effects: Minor (Bless, Detect Evil, PfE, Remove Fear), Modest (Cure Disease, Remove Paralysis, Slow Poison), Major (Death Ward, Negative Plane Protection).

restrictions.items: No Charm Animal. Limited weapons. No dual-class.

spellRestrictions.note: Blessings replace all ranger spells. Minor (Bless, Detect Evil, PfE, Remove Fear), Modest (Cure Disease, Remove Paralysis, Slow Poison), Major (Death Ward, Negative Plane Protection).

statBonus.note: -2 CHA. Scaling +1 save vs Death at lv1/5/10/15/20. At lv20: immune to fear/disease/level drain/paralysis.

passive.desc: +3 THAC0/damage vs undead and fiends. Turn Undead as priest 2 levels higher.

activated.effects: Touch: 1d8/3 levels vs undead (save vs Death -4 or destroyed), 1d6/3 levels vs fiends (banish), 1d4/3 levels vs evil (feeblemind).

restrictions.items: Cannot create undead, resurrect, or summon fiends. Cannot be resurrected. Dual to Fighter.

spellRestrictions.note: Cannot create undead, resurrect, or summon fiends. Cannot be resurrected. Loses standard necromancy and summoning.

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLAs. Redeem innate replaces most offensive priest casting.

passive.desc: No 15% penalty scribing other schools. d6 hit die.

activated.effects: Lose 25% max HP, gain +3 caster level, -2 casting time, -2 save vs Spell/Death. Can kill self.

restrictions.items: Necromancer school. Enemies don't get -2 save vs Necromancy. Dual to Fighter.

spellRestrictions.note: Necromancer school specialist. No 15% scribe penalty for other schools. Enemies do NOT get -2 save vs Necromancy.

hlaPool.note: Necromancer specialist; standard mage HLA pool.

passive.desc: Backstab stuns undead 1 round (save vs Death -2). +10% Find Traps and Move Silently.

activated.effects: Undead ignore you for 1 turn (cannot act during).
3d8 acid + 3d8 magic vs undead, no save.

restrictions.items: 20 skill pts/level. No Pick Pockets. Dual to Mage.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool. Backstab can stun undead.

passive.desc: +5 THAC0/damage vs undead. +2 movement speed. -2 speed factor. Immune to disease and fear. d12 hit die.

activated.effects: 5 rounds: +5 STR, +3 save vs Spells/Death, +1 APR. 5% berserk risk.

restrictions.items: Only proficient in ranged. No dual-class.

spellRestrictions.note: Only proficient in ranged weapons. No dual-class.

statBonus.note: +2 movement speed. -2 speed factor. Immune to disease/fear. d12 HD.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool. Ancient Wrath rage innate.

passive.desc: Bard song: enemies -1 Luck (scaling to -3 at lv20), no save.

activated.effects: Dreadful Deeds (lv1, deafen), Beloved One (lv6, berserk), Gods' Wrath (lv11, fear), Warm Memories (lv16, dominate), Dying Conscience (lv21, stun).

restrictions.items: No Enhanced Bard Song or Use Any Item HLA. No dual-class.

hlaPool.note: No Enhanced Bard Song or Use Any Item HLA (per research)

spellRestrictions.note: No other bard songs (only custom Requiem song).

passive.desc: +2 AC/THAC0/damage vs constructs, fiends, lycanthropes, and undead.

activated.effects: Extra offensive spells per tier: I) Fireball, Icelance, Lightning Bolt; II) Ice Storm, Smashing Wave; III) Cone of Cold, Sunfire; IV) Chain Lightning, Whirlwind.

restrictions.items: No animal summoning. No Shapeshift. Dual to Fighter.

passive.desc: NPC-only kit. Assigns the Circle Enforcer kit to Jaheira.
+2 THAC0/damage vs wizards, priests, and undead.

activated.effects: Hold Undead (lv5), Repulse Undead (lv11), Control Undead (lv15).
Melee hits reduce target casting by 10%/hit for 5 rounds. Undead: save vs Death or destroyed.

restrictions.items: Stunning Blow every 6 levels (not 4). No Quivering Palm. No Lay on Hands. No Find Traps. Cannot be resurrected.

hlaPool.note: Stunning Blow scales slower (every 6 levels vs 4). No Quivering Palm.

spellRestrictions.note: No Find Traps. No Quivering Palm. No Lay on Hands. Cannot be resurrected.

passive.desc: Shamanic Dance replaced with self-damaging Curses (1-3 HP/round). One fewer spell per level per day. d6 hit die.

activated.effects: Misfortune (lv1), Rage (lv3), Terror (lv5), Madness (lv7), Emptiness (lv11), Agony (lv13), Servitude (lv15). Save vs Death, scaling penalty.

spellRestrictions.note: Curses replace spirit summoning via dance. Self-damaging (1-3 HP/round).

statBonus.note: d6 HD. One fewer spell per level. Female only.

passive.desc: Immune to cold damage and level drain
100% vulnerability to magic damage. -2 save vs Necromancy. One fewer spell per level.

activated.effects: 1d4/2 levels magic to undead, heals 4 HP on kill.
Immune to non-magical weapons + undead attacks, +3 caster level, extra magic vulnerability.

spellRestrictions.note: One fewer spell per level per day. 100% vulnerability to magic damage.

statBonus.note: One fewer spell per level. Immune to cold/level drain. 100% magic damage vulnerability.

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool. Unique undead-themed innates.

new: Ranger devoted to hunting and destroying undead. Anti-undead tracking and combat.
Paladin devoted to redeeming lost souls. Goes beyond simple church ordination.
Necromancer devoted to destroying undead rather than creating them.
Thief making a living by tricking and outsmarting the undead.
Barbarian appointed by tribal shamans to guard burial grounds from undead.
Bard whose appearance heralds tragedy. Songs of sorrow that ward off undead.
Druid appointed to enforce the natural order against undead corruption.
Assigns the Circle Enforcer kit to Jaheira.
Monk of the Order of the Pallid Mask, servants of Jergal hunting undead.
Reclusive woman wielding dark nature magic against undead threats.
Someone meant to die but whose soul was trapped. Undead-touched sorcery.

sum: Adds anti-undead themed kits across multiple classes (Undead Predator, Holy Redeemer, Deathslayer, and more) for characters specializing in fighting undead.

co.no: Undead Predator ranger kit. Specialized anti-undead warrior with bonuses against undead creatures and resistances to undead abilities.
Holy Redeemer cleric kit. Divine champion dedicated to destroying undead and protecting the living.
potential incompatible with ToF's cleric components?

If installing Deathslayer and TnB's "Revised Specialists": "Enable the Console Commands, create a Good-alignment Necromancer with at least 16 CON" "While in the game, select only the Necromancer, leav
Incompatible with other revisions like AK's, FnP's, or ToF's
Burial Defender fighter kit. Guardian of graves and crypts with defensive abilities against undead.
probably incompatible with ToF's barbarian overhaul
Pallid Mask monk kit. Undead-themed martial artist who channels necrotic energy in combat.
Imprisoned Soul sorcerer kit. Sorcerer touched by undeath gaining necrotic spellcasting abilities.
